input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.2.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.2.4.2
            TITLE: technical inspectors may examine any other items at their discretion

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.2.4.2: Technical Inspectors may examine any other items at their discretion
IN.2.4.2 Technical Inspectors may examine any other items at their discretion
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 110 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Technical Inspectors may examine any other items at their discretion
